bugs.title: SmithingTemplateTrades does not register trader trades on 26.1.2 (Fabric trade API removed)
bugs.evidence: On 26.1.2 the function logs a notice and returns early; the fabric-object-builder-api-v1 23.0.13+b61fef4359 (the version bundled with fabric-api 0.144.0+26.1 for MC 26.1.2) no longer contains TradeOfferHelper.class -- verified by inspecting the jar contents.
bugs.expected: Per cycle-5 acceptance criteria Task 3, trader trades should work on all 5 versions including 26.1.2.
bugs.suggested_fix: Either (a) accept graceful degradation as implemented (templates remain obtainable via crafting and stronghold/bastion loot, which DO work on 26.1.2), or (b) implement a data-driven trade JSON in src/main/resources/data/.../trade for 26.1.2 since the Fabric helper is gone.

bugs.title: Recipe canonicalization is not single-form across all 5 MC versions because vanilla codecs differ
bugs.evidence: MC 1.21.1 Ingredient codec requires { item: ... } / { tag: ... } object form; MC 1.21.4+ HolderSet codec requires bare string ('minecraft:item' / '#namespace:tag') and rejects the object form. Per-jar codec inspection confirmed both formats are mutually exclusive.
bugs.expected: Single canonical item-ref format that works on all 5 MC versions.
bugs.suggested_fix: Implemented mitigation: shared recipe/ uses 1.21.4+ canonical form (bare strings, #-prefix tags, { id: ... } results). Per-version overlay at versions/1.21.1/src/main/resources/data/dndweapons/recipe/ (58 files) provides object-form recipes for 1.21.1 via processResources duplicatesStrategy=EXCLUDE first-wins. No overlay generated for 1.20.1 (different directory: recipes/ vs recipe/, and different result-key 'item' vs 'id'); 1.20.1 would need 58 additional overlay files in data/dndweapons/recipes/ to support smithing recipes there. Currently 1.20.1 has no smithing recipes (graceful degradation -- templates registered but cannot be used).

bugs.title: 1.20.1 has no smithing recipe overlay; 1.20.1 cannot craft tiered weapons via smithing table
bugs.evidence: 1.20.1 reads recipe JSONs from data/<ns>/recipes/ (plural) while the shared smithing files live in data/<ns>/recipe/ (singular). No 1.20.1 overlay was generated for the 56 smithing recipes.
bugs.expected: 1.20.1 should also support smithing-table crafting of the tier upgrades, per Phase 4 acceptance.
bugs.suggested_fix: Generate 56 per-version 1.20.1 overlay files under versions/1.20.1/src/main/resources/data/dndweapons/recipes/ with the 1.20.1 format: directory 'recipes/' (plural), result uses {item: ..., count: 1} (not {id: ...}), all ingredients use { tag: ... } / { item: ... } object form. Recipe-codegen script would simplify generating all 56.
